title: Player Plushies
description: Plushy decoration pack for the GINSMP
body:
## What is it?
- A unoffical resourcepack for the GINSMP featuring friends and players in leadership.
- Pack does not replace any existing item but only obtainable by renaming either a **iron nugget** or a **totem of undying** to the chosen name in an anvil.
- Displayed in a invisible item frame.
## Want to be apart of the collection?
1. As the project started a nice treat to the Flora community all active members will recieve one.
2. Players in leadership or high positions that I myself have to know of and have conversed with will be offered.
3. Server _celebrities_ is a very rare way to join but if enough people refer to your name it could happen.
4. Special server events that I'm happy to sponsor with a plushy reward (GinSMP Got Talent)

![Unique plushy players does not inclue secondaries ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df8f546f6b01ddb9bd09316c78e9a6b9beeccfa4.png)
